name: io.github.djautomd-lab/aipaygent
title: AiPayGent — 65+ AI Tools for Agents
description: Research, write, code, translate, scrape the web, store agent memory, and more. 65+ tools via MCP. Free tier: 10 calls/day. No API keys needed.

environmentVariables.description: Optional API key for unlimited access. Free tier (10 calls/day) works without it.
